story.title: What xAI's Grok Build CLI Actually Sends to xAI

points.heading: Secrets Files Sent Unredacted
points.detail: Grok transmits file contents, including unredacted secrets from a .env file, to xAI.

points.heading: Whole Repo Snapshot Uploaded
points.detail: Grok uploads a snapshot of the entire workspace, proven by 5.1 GiB of a 12 GB repo sent.

points.heading: Transmission, Acceptance, Storage
points.detail: The teardown proves data transmission, acceptance, and storage by xAI, not whether xAI trains on the data.

points.heading: Findings are Reproducible
points.detail: The findings are backed by captured artifacts (like endpoint, HTTP method) and reproducible commands.
